tluaLabelDeadBlock.tlua(10,7): error TLUA7027: Unreachable code detected.
tluaLabelDeadBlock.tlua(10,9): error TLUA7028: Unused label.
tluaLabelDeadBlock.tlua(16,7): error TLUA7027: Unreachable code detected.


==== tluaLabelDeadBlock.tlua (5 errors) ====
    // A dead block still scopes its labels: an unused label inside one is reported
    // exactly like an unused label directly in the dead tail of a live block.
    function deadLabelBare(): number
        return 1;
        ::L1::
        ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA7027: Unreachable code detected.
          ~~
!!! error TLUA7028: Unused label.
    end
    
    function deadLabelInBlock(): number {
        return 1;
        { ::L2:: }
          ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA7027: Unreachable code detected.
            ~~
!!! error TLUA7028: Unused label.
    }
    
    // And a goto inside a dead block still marks its label referenced.
    function deadBlockGotoReferences(): number {
        return 1;
        { ::L3:: goto L3 }
          ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA7027: Unreachable code detected.
    }
